name: transportation_clinical_trial_amendment_millhaven_st_lt
premise: A whistleblower submission and a customer complaint surfaced the same underlying issue through different evidence chains. In Transportation Infrastructure, the situation tagged internally around transportation clinical trial amendment millhaven st lt has converged with local pressure in the Transportation corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Frontline managers report that frontline staff are already deviating from policy; silence from the top will be read as tacit approval. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. Framing has already hardened externally as short term against long term; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Mateo Rahman
agents.identity: I am Mateo Rahman, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Transportation Infrastructure. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Leila Morales
agents.identity: I am Leila Morales, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Transportation Infrastructure. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if short term advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for long term.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Mateo Rahman must choose under short term versus long term. What does Mateo Rahman do?
